isolation.method: Go unit tests with httptest.NewServer mock HTTP servers

assertions.title: Non-streaming chat completion routes to Codex backend via model prefix

steps.expected: ChatCompletion returns valid response with correct object, id, choices, message content and role
steps.observed: Test passed — response contains object=chat.completion, id=resp-test-123, choices[0].message.content=Hello from Codex!, role=assistant

steps.expected: Request is forwarded to /responses endpoint
steps.observed: Test passed — request URL = /responses

assertions.title: Non-streaming chat completion preserves all message roles

steps.expected: System message extracted as 'instructions', non-system messages forwarded as input
steps.observed: Test passed — instructions='You are a helpful assistant.', 3 input messages (user, assistant, user) forwarded correctly

assertions.title: Non-streaming chat completion translates temperature and max_tokens

steps.expected: Temperature 0.7 forwarded, max_tokens=500 mapped to max_output_tokens=500
steps.observed: Test passed — temperature=0.7 and max_output_tokens=500 correctly forwarded in upstream request

assertions.title: Streaming chat completion produces valid SSE event stream

steps.expected: SSE stream with data: lines, delta content, chat.completion.chunk objects, and [DONE] sentinel
steps.observed: Test passed — stream contains data: lines, [DONE], chat.completion.chunk objects, delta field, finish_reason stop, and content 'Hello from Codex!'

assertions.title: Streaming chat completion reconstructs full message from deltas

steps.expected: Delta content 'Hello' + ' from' + ' Codex!' concatenated forms complete message
steps.observed: Test passed — stream contains 'Hello', 'Codex!' content fragments forming 'Hello from Codex!'

assertions.title: Native responses API passthrough without translation

steps.expected: POST /v1/responses forwards raw Codex response without chat completions wrapping
steps.observed: Test passed — response has object=response, id=resp_abc123, status=completed (Codex schema, not chat completions). Model prefix stripped to o4-mini.

assertions.title: Native responses API streaming passthrough

steps.expected: SSE stream with Codex-specific event types (response.created, response.output_text.delta, response.completed), NOT chat.completion.chunk
steps.observed: Test passed — stream contains response.created, response.output_text.delta, response.completed. No chat.completion.chunk present.

assertions.title: Model listing includes Codex models with correct ownership

steps.expected: 2 models (o4-mini, gpt-5.2-codex) with owned_by=codex, object=model, non-zero created
steps.observed: Test passed — both models present, owned_by=codex, object=model, created timestamp non-zero

assertions.title: Model listing with prefix shows Codex models correctly

steps.expected: Models can be referenced as codex/<model_id> and routing succeeds
steps.observed: Test passed — ListModels returns o4-mini and gpt-5.2-codex, and PrefixRouting resolves codex/o4-mini and codex/gpt-5.2-codex correctly

assertions.title: Model prefix routing resolves codex/o4-mini to Codex backend

steps.expected: Registry.Resolve('codex/o4-mini') returns codex backend with modelID=o4-mini
steps.observed: Test passed — backend=codex, modelID=o4-mini

assertions.title: Model prefix routing resolves codex/gpt-5.2-codex to Codex backend

steps.expected: Registry.Resolve('codex/gpt-5.2-codex') returns codex backend with modelID=gpt-5.2-codex
steps.observed: Test passed — backend=codex, modelID=gpt-5.2-codex

assertions.title: Model prefix routing does not match non-codex prefixes

steps.expected: Resolve('openrouter/o4-mini') returns error, does not match codex
steps.observed: Test passed — error returned for openrouter/o4-mini, confirming no cross-prefix matching

assertions.title: Error when Codex tokens are unavailable

steps.expected: Error mentioning authentication/OAuth when no token is available
steps.observed: Test passed — error returned mentioning 'authentication'. Log output: 'token refresh error: codex oauth: no token available for refresh'

assertions.title: Error when Codex backend is not configured but model prefix is used

steps.expected: Error when resolving codex/o4-mini on registry without codex backend
steps.observed: Test passed — Resolve returns error when codex backend not registered. Hot-reload removal test confirms codex/o4-mini fails after removal.

assertions.title: Codex API rate limit error is forwarded to client

steps.expected: Error returned referencing 429 status
steps.observed: Test passed — error references 429 when upstream returns HTTP 429 with rate limit error

assertions.title: Codex API model not available error is forwarded to client

steps.expected: Error returned when upstream returns 404 with model not found
steps.observed: Test passed — error returned for nonexistent model

assertions.title: Codex API subscription/billing error is forwarded to client

steps.expected: Error referencing 402 when upstream returns HTTP 402
steps.observed: Test passed — error references 402 when upstream returns payment required

assertions.title: Codex API internal server error is forwarded to client

steps.expected: Error referencing 500 when upstream returns HTTP 500
steps.observed: Test passed — error references 500 when upstream returns internal server error

assertions.title: Format translation — multi-turn conversation round-trip

steps.expected: System message as instructions, non-system messages as input array, response in chat completions format
steps.observed: Test passed — system message extracted as instructions='You are a helpful assistant.', 3 messages forwarded as input, response returned in chat completions format

assertions.title: Format translation — response ID and metadata preserved

steps.expected: Response has non-empty id, created timestamp, and model
steps.observed: Test passed — id, created, and model fields are all non-empty/non-zero

assertions.title: Format translation — usage stats are populated

steps.expected: Usage object with prompt_tokens>0, completion_tokens>0, total_tokens>0
steps.observed: Test passed — usage.prompt_tokens=15, usage.completion_tokens=8, usage.total_tokens=23 (all > 0)

assertions.title: Format translation — finish_reason is set correctly

steps.expected: finish_reason='stop' for completed response
steps.observed: Test passed — finish_reason='stop'

steps.expected: finish_reason='length' for incomplete/truncated response
steps.observed: Test passed — finish_reason='length' when upstream status='incomplete'

assertions.title: Format translation — streaming finish_reason transitions correctly

steps.expected: Intermediate chunks have finish_reason=null, final chunk has finish_reason='stop'
steps.observed: Test passed — hasNullFinish=true (intermediate chunks), hasStopFinish=true (final chunk)

assertions.title: Existing OpenAI backends work alongside Codex backend

steps.expected: Both codex and openrouter backends registered, codex resolves correctly
steps.observed: Test passed — registry has both backends, Resolve('codex/o4-mini') returns codex backend

assertions.title: Existing OpenAI backend model listing is unaffected by Codex

steps.expected: All 3 backend types registered (openrouter, copilot, codex)
steps.observed: Test passed — 3 backends registered, all names present

assertions.title: Concurrent requests from same OAuth session succeed

steps.expected: 5 concurrent requests all succeed, all reach upstream
steps.observed: Test passed — 5 concurrent requests completed without error, requestCount=5

assertions.title: Concurrent streaming requests from same OAuth session succeed

steps.expected: Mixed concurrent streaming and non-streaming requests both succeed
steps.observed: Test passed — both streaming and non-streaming concurrent requests completed with correct formats

assertions.title: Concurrent streaming and non-streaming requests from same OAuth session

steps.expected: Streaming request returns SSE data, non-streaming returns choices array
steps.observed: Test passed — streaming response contains 'data: ' SSE lines, non-streaming has choices array

assertions.title: Non-streaming request preserves original request body fields

steps.expected: top_p, presence_penalty, frequency_penalty preserved in forwarded request
steps.observed: Test passed — presence_penalty, frequency_penalty, and top_p all present in forwarded body

assertions.title: Empty messages array returns validation error

steps.expected: Error returned for empty messages array
steps.observed: Test passed — error returned when messages array is empty

assertions.title: Unknown model under codex prefix returns error

steps.expected: Error when upstream returns 404 for unknown model
steps.observed: Test passed — error returned for nonexistent-model

assertions.title: Config hot-reload adds Codex backend without restart

steps.expected: Codex backend registered after LoadFromConfig with codex config, Resolve succeeds
steps.observed: Test passed — codex registered after reload, codex/o4-mini resolves to codex backend with modelID=o4-mini

assertions.title: Config hot-reload removes Codex backend without restart

steps.expected: Codex backend removed after reload, Resolve fails, openrouter still works
steps.observed: Test passed — codex removed, Resolve('codex/o4-mini') returns error, openrouter still registered

assertions.title: Chat completion with tool/function calling returns error or graceful fallback

steps.expected: Request with tools parameter does not crash, returns valid response
steps.observed: Test passed — request with tools in RawBody succeeded, response returned with valid chat completion

assertions.title: Streaming connection interruption is handled gracefully

steps.expected: Empty/truncated stream still produces valid SSE with [DONE] sentinel
steps.observed: Test passed — even empty stream output contains [DONE] sentinel, no crash

assertions.title: Large request body with many messages succeeds

steps.expected: Request with 51 messages succeeds
steps.observed: Test passed — 51-message request completed successfully with valid response

assertions.title: Unicode and special characters in messages are preserved

steps.expected: Chinese characters, emoji, accented characters preserved in both input and output
steps.observed: Test passed — 你好, 🎉, café preserved in response. Input also preserved: 你好, 🎉 in received input

assertions.title: Health endpoint reflects Codex backend status

steps.expected: Status shows not authenticated, needs reauth
steps.observed: Test passed — Authenticated=false, NeedsReauth=true, BackendName=codex

steps.expected: Status shows authenticated, does not need reauth
steps.observed: Test passed — Authenticated=true, NeedsReauth=false, TokenSource=codex_oauth

steps.expected: Status shows not authenticated but has refresh token so no reauth needed
steps.observed: Test passed — Authenticated=false, NeedsReauth=false (has refresh token)

steps.expected: Status shows not authenticated, needs reauth
steps.observed: Test passed — Authenticated=false, NeedsReauth=true

summary: Tested 38 assertions: 38 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. All Go unit tests passed (38 Codex-specific tests in internal/backend + 15 proxy handler tests in internal/proxy). Build verified successful. Test coverage uses httptest.NewServer mock HTTP servers for full isolation — no external API calls.
